content:
## Transfer Description
Internal transfer between Northstar accounts is used only for moving funds between Northstar Bank accounts. The transfer type recorded for this product is internal. Do not describe it as an ACH, wire, check, card payment, or external account transfer.

## Pricing and Limits
| Attribute | Term |
|---|---|
| Fee | 0 |
| Per-transfer cap | not specified |
| Counts toward external daily limit | False |

Because no per-transfer cap is specified for this transfer type, do not quote a dollar ceiling from another transfer product. See "Transfer Types Fees And Limits Guide" when comparing this product with external transfer options.

## Timing
| Attribute | Term |
|---|---|
| Cutoff time | not specified |
| Delivery business days | 0 |

Internal transfers have no specified cutoff time in this product record. The delivery period is 0 business days, so the transfer should not be explained using external-network settlement language. See "Transfer Cutoff And Delivery Policy" for timing rules that apply to other transfer types.

## Customer Explanation
When a customer asks about moving money between their Northstar accounts, identify this as Internal transfer between Northstar accounts and quote only the listed fee, limit, cutoff, and delivery terms. If the customer asks whether it affects an external transfer allowance, use the listed value for counts toward external daily limit rather than inferring from account ownership.
title: Internal Transfer Terms
